title: Projectile Launchers
description: A somewhat vanilla friendly mod that adds guns that shoot minecraft projectiles.
body:
A somewhat vanilla friendly mod that adds guns that shoot minecraft projectiles.

See Gallery for Crafting Recipies.

The first thing you will need to make is a **Vial** made with glass. You then need to make a **Table** and turn it into a **Lab Table**. You can then right click the **Lab Table** and insert **16 Vials** and a lava bucket (don't worry, the procedure does not consume the bucket and you will get it back) and then hit the "Craft" button. This should give you 16 **Vials of Fire**. (This is the ammo for the fireball launcher).
